allow:
Bash(python -c "
content = open\('C:/Users/김준현/meeting-app/index.html', encoding='utf-8'\).read\(\)

checks = [
  \('isRunning flag declared',           'let isRunning      = false;'\),
  \('AbortController declared',          'let abortController = null;'\),
  \('checkReady isRunning guard',        'analyzeBtn.disabled = isRunning ||'\),
  \('cancelBtn in HTML',                 'id=\\"cancelBtn\\"'\),
  \('cancel-btn CSS class',              '.cancel-btn {'\),
  \('analyze-row wrapper',               'class=\\"analyze-row\\"'\),
  \('collapseBtn in HTML',               'id=\\"collapseBtn\\"'\),
  \('disabled on copyNotesBtn',          'id=\\"copyNotesBtn\\" disabled'\),
  \('disabled on dlTxtBtn',              'id=\\"dlTxtBtn\\" disabled'\),
  \('notesCardTitle span',               'id=\\"notesCardTitle\\"'\),
  \('notes-hero-body max-height 70vh',   'max-height: 70vh;'\),
  \('print max-height none override',    'max-height: none !important; overflow: visible !important;'\),
  \('reader.cancel in finally',          'reader.cancel\(\).catch\(\(\) => {}\);'\),
  \('429 rate limit check once',         \\"if \(res.status === 429\) throw new Error\\"\),
  \('429 rate limit check stream',       \\"if \(response.status === 429\) throw new Error\\"\),
  \('401 check',                         \\"if \(res.status === 401\) throw new Error\\"\),
  \('abort signal in callClaudeOnce',    'signal: abortController ? abortController.signal'\),
  \('abort signal in callClaudeStream',  'signal: abortController ? abortController.signal'\),
  \('AbortError handler',                \\"err.name === 'AbortError'\\"\),
  \('cancelBtn event listener',          \\"document.getElementById\('cancelBtn'\).addEventListener\\"\),
  \('isRunning=true in handler',         'isRunning = true;'\),
  \('isRunning=false in finally',        'isRunning = false;'\),
  \('abortController=null in finally',   'abortController = null;'\),
  \('scrollIntoView',                    'scrollIntoView'\),
  \('avgScore formula fixed',            'Math.round\(totalScore / count\)'\),
  \('avgScore * 10 removed',             'Math.round\(\(totalScore / count\) * 10\)'\),
  \('agent5 no setTimeout',              'setTimeout\(\(\) => {\\n    setAgentNode\(5'\),
  \('setAgentNode 5 sync',               \\"setAgentNode\(5, 'done', allPassed\\"\),
  \('empty questions guard agent3',      '문제가 없어 답안 작성을 건너뜁니다.'\),
  \('empty questions guard agent4',      '문제가 없어 채점을 건너뜁니다.'\),
  \('feedStartTime reset',               'feedStartTime = null;'\),
  \('dotNotes reset in resetAgentNodes', \\"document.getElementById\('dotNotes'\).className = 'status-dot';\\"\),
  \('notesCardTitle reset',              \\"document.getElementById\('notesCardTitle'\).textContent = '📚 통합 학습 노트';\\"\),
  \('progress per agent step',           'Agent 1: 노트 작성 중'\),
  \('MAX_ITERATIONS constant',           'const MAX_ITERATIONS   = 5;'\),
  \('MAX_TOKENS_QA constant',            'const MAX_TOKENS_QA    = 6000;'\),
  \('collapse button logic',             'collapsed = !collapsed;'\),
  \('PASS_SCORE_BINARY in displayReview','item.score === PASS_SCORE_BINARY'\),
  \('PASS_SCORE_SA in agent4',           'r.score >= PASS_SCORE_SA'\),
  \('PDF popup fallback',                'Popup blocked'\),
  \('filterTranscript fallback log',     \\"console.warn\('[filterTranscript]\\"\),
  \('parseTypedAnswers regex fixed',     \\"[.\):]|\\\\$\)\\"\),
  \('action-btn disabled CSS',           '.action-btn:disabled {'\),
  \('enable buttons after agent1',       'Enable download buttons now that notes are ready'\),
]

ok = 0
fail = 0
for desc, needle in checks:
  neg = needle.startswith\('!'\)
  if neg: needle = needle[1:]
  found = needle in content
  if neg:
    if found:
      print\(f'  FAIL \(should be absent\) {desc}'\)
      fail += 1
    else:
      print\(f'  ok   {desc}'\)
      ok += 1
  else:
    if found:
      print\(f'  ok   {desc}'\)
      ok += 1
    else:
      print\(f'  FAIL {desc}'\)
      fail += 1

print\(\)
print\(f'Results: {ok} passed, {fail} failed'\)
" 2>&1)
